message:
Update from parallel agent work

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -19,9 +19,9 @@
 {"id":"bd-212m.2.3","title":"Glamour: fix task list marker rendering","description":"Fix task list marker rendering to match Go (checkbox markers and bullets).

Scope:
- Reproduce with fixture: list_task_list.
- Identify where task list markers are parsed/rendered (pulldown-cmark Event::TaskListMarker or equivalent handling in crates/glamour/src/lib.rs).
- Adjust marker output to match Go (no extra bullet, correct spacing and marker glyph).
- Add unit tests for checked/unchecked task list items.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- list_task_list fixture passes with no SKIP.
- Unit tests cover checked + unchecked task items and spacing around marker.
- Conformance test_glamour passes for task list cases.","notes":"Files: crates/glamour/src/lib.rs (list/task list handling), tests/conformance/crates/glamour/mod.rs fixtures for list_task_list.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:14.684989440Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T04:42:29.256604702Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T04:42:29.256585866Z","close_reason":"Task list markers match Go; fixtures+tests updated","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.3","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:14.684989440Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.2.4","title":"Glamour: align link rendering with Go","description":"Align link rendering with Go (inline links with URL appended, reference links, and title formatting).

Scope:
- Reproduce with fixtures: link_inline, link_inline_title, link_reference.
- Inspect Event::Start(Tag::Link) handling in crates/glamour/src/lib.rs; check whether URL is appended and how titles are rendered.
- Update link rendering to match Go output (text + URL + title formatting).
- Add unit tests for inline and reference links with/without titles.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- link_inline, link_inline_title, link_reference fixtures pass with no SKIP.
- Unit tests cover inline links (with title), reference links, and bare URLs.
- Conformance test_glamour passes for link cases.","notes":"Append URL after link text, skip for autolinks where text=URL. 3 link conformance tests now pass (link_inline, link_inline_title, link_reference).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:22.019369405Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T02:01:45.881126324Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T02:01:45.881064748Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.4","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:22.019369405Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.2.5","title":"Glamour: fix email autolink formatting","description":"Fix email autolink formatting to match Go (mailto prefix and display text).

Scope:
- Reproduce with fixture: link_autolink_email.
- Inspect autolink handling in crates/glamour/src/lib.rs; determine where mailto: is applied or stripped.
- Update formatting to match Go output exactly (prefix, brackets, spacing).
- Add unit test for email autolink rendering.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- link_autolink_email fixture passes with no SKIP.
- Unit test covers email autolink formatting differences (mailto prefix).
- Conformance test_glamour passes for autolink case.","notes":"Files: crates/glamour/src/lib.rs (link/autolink handling), tests/conformance/crates/glamour/mod.rs fixture link_autolink_email.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:29.475327589Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T05:43:21.125634097Z","closed_at":"2026-01-25T05:43:21.125602658Z","close_reason":"Add mailto prefix for email autolinks; update fixture; tests pass","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.5","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:29.475327589Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

- Replace arrow glyph and adjust spacing/punctuation to match Go output.
- Add unit tests for image links with/without title.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:

Updated DISCREPANCIES.md to reflect 2 more passing tests (45/84 vs 43/84). Build verification blocked by cargo lock contention from other agents.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.6","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:36.716309693Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"bd-212m.2.7","title":"Glamour: fix blockquote multi-paragraph + nested","description":"Fix blockquote formatting for multi-paragraph and nested blockquotes to match Go.

Scope:
- Reproduce with fixtures: blockquote_multi_paragraph, blockquote_nested.
- Inspect blockquote rendering in crates/glamour/src/lib.rs (Tag::BlockQuote handling) and how paragraph breaks are inserted.
- Ensure empty line between paragraphs and correct nesting markers per Go.
- Add unit tests for multi-paragraph and nested blockquotes.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
- blockquote_multi_paragraph and blockquote_nested fixtures pass with no SKIP.
- Unit tests cover paragraph separation within blockquotes and nested depth prefixing.
- Conformance test_glamour passes for blockquote cases.","notes":"Latest conformance (target/conformance_20260124_210554.log) shows new FAILs in blockquote_single_line, blockquote_multi_line, blockquote_multi_paragraph, blockquote_with_formatting. Actual output has trailing right border "│" and missing styles (bold/italic/fg). Update scope to fix these in addition to nested/multi-paragraph handling.","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:44.230449417Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-25T02:32:48.228008484Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-212m.2.7","depends_on_id":"bd-212m.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-25T00:46:44.230449417Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"bd-212m.3","title":"Lipgloss parity gaps","description":"Resolve Lipgloss parity gaps; current conformance skips partial border edges.

Scope:
- Implement partial border edge rendering in crates/lipgloss (border.rs, style.rs, renderer.rs).
- Add unit tests for partial borders and edge combinations.
- Update conformance fixtures and ensure lipgloss tests pass.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:

Scope:

- Add unit tests for partial edges and mixed edge visibility.","acceptance_criteria":"Criteria:
